form.formComment: Finished in the minors last time in a Class 2 at this track when a 1.2 lengths third but did run a solid 17.22 over the 295m trip. Can continue the solid form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished in the minors last time in a Class 2 at this track when a 1.2 lengths third but did run a solid 17.22 over the 295m trip. Can continue the solid form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Lost ground and checked into bend.

form.formComment: Placed last time (17.27) at this track in a Class 2, finishing second and beaten 2 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting seven places from 10 starts. Hard to beat with even luck.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Placed last time (17.27) at this track in a Class 2, finishing second and beaten 2 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting seven places from 10 starts. Hard to beat with even luck.

form.formComment: Comes off a (17.17) win last time, scoring by 2.25 lengths in a Class 1 over 295m at this track. Still a maiden from this draw but has never missed the frame from two starts. In form and can make it three straight.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Comes off a (17.17) win last time, scoring by 2.25 lengths in a Class 1 over 295m at this track. Still a maiden from this draw but has never missed the frame from two starts. In form and can make it three straight.

form.formComment: Last start finished fourth on March 27 over 295m at this track behind Wonderful Chaos, beaten 5 lengths (17.76) in a Class 2. Can't enthuse on this occasion.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished fourth on March 27 over 295m at this track behind Wonderful Chaos, beaten 5 lengths (17.76) in a Class 2. Can't enthuse on this occasion.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by a neck over 390m at Ascot Park in a handy (22.60), beating Back Chat Bailey. Among the chances and worth following up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to win last start by a neck over 390m at Ascot Park in a handy (22.60), beating Back Chat Bailey. Among the chances and worth following up.

form.formComment: Last start winner (17.08) at this track in a Class 1 and will jump from box 7 for the first time. In winning form now and looks a major threat.

formComments.comment: Last start winner (17.08) at this track in a Class 1 and will jump from box 7 for the first time. In winning form now and looks a major threat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Ran in restricted room around bend, came off heels and dragged down.

form.formComment: Was in commission but ran below her best last start when sixth (23.12) over 390m at Ascot Park. Was in the money two on end before missing the frame last time.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 295m at this track. Downgrades and dangerous.
